name: Sour Cream Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
CAKE
1. Melt chocolate with hot water over low heat.
2. In a separate bowl, cream eggs and sugar thoroughly until light and fluffy.
3. Gradually add sour cream to the egg mixture, mixing well after each addition.
4. Combine flour, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl.
5. Alternately add the dry ingredients and sour cream mixture to the egg mixture, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients, until just combined.
6. Pour batter into 2 greased and floured 8-inch cake pans.
7. Place pans in a preheated oven set to 300°F (150°C) and bake for 30-35 minutes. For a 9x13 inch pan, bake for 50-60 minutes.
8. Cool cakes completely before icing.
ICING
1. In a saucepan, mix sugar and cocoa until well combined.
2. Add butter or margarine, corn syrup, and milk to the sugar mixture.
3. Heat over low heat, stirring constantly, until it reaches a boil.
4. Boil for 2 minutes after reaching boiling point.
5. Remove from heat and allow to cool for 5 minutes.
6. Beat the cooled icing until thick enough to spread.
7. Add chopped pecans and vanilla; stir gently.
8. Spread between cake layers and on top of the cake.
